caption: The video shows two men working together to load a large, yellow and black storage case into the back of a van. The first man, wearing a dark hoodie and jeans, is positioned inside the van, while the second man, dressed in a black coat and scarf, stands outside assisting. They carefully maneuver the heavy case, ensuring it fits securely among other items already in the van, including cardboard boxes with "Amazon" labels. The scene takes place in what appears to be a warehouse or loading area, with a door and some tools visible in the foreground. The men work methodically, demonstrating teamwork and coordination as they complete the task.
